allow: PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Users\\z3635\\Downloads\\盖世游戏 GameHub - 在Mac上畅玩Windows游戏.html'; $content = Get-Content -LiteralPath $path -Raw; $len = $content.Length; $lines = \(Get-Content -LiteralPath $path\).Count; "LENGTH=$len`nLINES=$lines`nSTART=`n$\($content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1200,$len\)\)\)")

PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Users\\z3635\\Downloads\\盖世游戏 GameHub - 在Mac上畅玩Windows游戏.html'; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path,[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); "START=`n$\($content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1500,$content.Length\)\)\)")
PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Users\\z3635\\Downloads\\盖世游戏 GameHub - 在Mac上畅玩Windows游戏.html'; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $bom = \($bytes[0..2] -join ' '\); "BOM=$bom")

PowerShell($path='c:\\Users\\z3635\\Downloads\\盖世游戏 GameHub - 在Mac上畅玩Windows游戏.html'; $html=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path,[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $labels=[regex]::Matches\($html,'>\([^<>]{1,40}\)','IgnoreCase,Singleline'\); $seen = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]; foreach\($m in $labels\){ $t=[System.Net.WebUtility]::HtmlDecode\($m.Groups[1].Value\).Trim\(\); if\($t -and $seen.Add\($t\)\){ if\($t -match '游戏|Steam|FAQ|问题|下载|语言|登录|注册|首页|功能|方案|兼容|Mac|Windows|关注|联系我们'\){ $t } } })
